positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the provided image: a carefully arranged flat-lay product still life of three folded dress shirts on a beige textured surface. Preserve the original aspect ratio and keep the shirts, collars, buttons, fabric textures, and visible brand labels recognizable and coherent. The first frame is already a neat finished arrangement, not the start of unpacking or unfolding. During the clip, only a tiny natural settling motion passes through the fabric: the collar edges and the light gray cuff relax by a few millimeters, fine wrinkles ease subtly, and small highlights shift across the buttons and woven fabric. By the final frames, all three shirts are still in the same neat positions, fully settled and orderly. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable drift with gentle parallax, minimal and elegant, keeping the full product arrangement visible. Natural lighting, realistic colors, realistic fabric physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable object shapes, calm premium product motion.
negative_prompt: Do not unfold the shirts, do not slide or rearrange the stack, do not add hands, do not remove any shirt, do not change shirt colors, do not deform collars, buttons, seams, labels, or fabric weave, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden object movement, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, text artifacts, logo distortion.
